title: zym theme
description: A zym editor theme. One theme per file; loaded by src/theme/theme.ts. See docs/theming.md.

name.description: Theme id; the file is loaded by this name (e.g. "zym" ← zym.json).

appearance.description: Drives the diff tints (dark darkens the status accents, light lightens them) and which system scheme a no-background theme follows.

ui.description: Concern-grouped UI colors. Every field is optional and deep-merged over the built-in defaults. Read in code at the same path, e.g. ui.editor.background → theme.ui.editor.background.

background.description: Editor background. OMIT to follow the system light/dark scheme.

view.description: Base libadwaita view surface colors; defaults point at --view-fg-color / --view-bg-color and are resolved to RGB at load.

card.description: libadwaita card surface colors (boxed/elevated content); defaults point at --card-fg-color / --card-bg-color and are resolved to RGB at load.

popover.description: Background of elevated surfaces: pickers, popovers, menus.

selected.description: Background of a selected list/tree row.

success.description: Success text; also the source hue for the diff.added tints.

error.description: Error text; also the source hue for the diff.removed tints.

match.description: Background tint for every search match (use #rrggbbaa so it composes over text).

matchCurrent.description: The current match; falls back to search.match.

added.description: Added-line background. Omit to derive from status.success per appearance.

addedWord.description: Changed words within an added line; falls back to diff.added.

removed.description: Removed-line background. Omit to derive from status.error per appearance.

removedWord.description: Changed words within a removed line; falls back to diff.removed.

filler.description: Neutral pad for an aligned-but-empty side-by-side row.

fold.description: Neutral band for a collapsed-context placeholder row.

flash.description: Brief tint over an operated/yanked range (vim).

syntax.description: Tree-sitter capture name → color + optional font style. KEY ORDER MATTERS: a tag is created per entry in this order and later tags win, so more-specific categories come last (escapes after string; tag before type; property before function). Dotted captures inherit by longest-prefix (keyword.control → keyword).

spacing.description: Base spacing unit in px (margins/gaps). Defaults to 8.

color.description: A CSS color: #rgb, #rgba, #rrggbb, #rrggbbaa, rgb()/rgba(), or an Adwaita CSS-variable reference like --view-bg-color (resolved to RGB at load).

scale.description: Relative font size (1 = normal); e.g. 1.5 for an h1 heading.
